name: Shadow Milk Cookie
description:
Your new best friend!

─── ⋆⋅ 💻🌐👾 ⋅⋆ ───

Basically, this is a Shadow Milk Cookie bot based off Kinito Pet. He works like Kinito Pet, a little desktop buddy a long with Candy Apple and Black Sapphire.

You play as Pure Vanilla in this (PV's name in this is Nathaniel coz it fits him. Nathaniel Vanill). SMC is still himself, he's just got that Kinito Pet mix in him.

The year is set in 2017

PFP is by me.
